title: Horror$Place Invariant Bundle Schema v1
description: Schema for defining region-specific horror invariants that govern content generation and safety constraints.

region_id.description: Unique identifier for the region or location.

CIC.description: Catastrophic Imprint Coefficient: Quantifies the historical impact of major disasters.

MDI.description: Mythic Density Index: Measures the concentration of myths and urban legends.

AOS.description: Archival Opacity Score: Captures the completeness and reliability of historical records.

RRM.description: Ritual Residue Map: Indicates the presence of repeated, structured human behavior.

FCF.description: Folkloric Convergence Factor: Measures how many independent storylines point to the same area.

SPR.description: Spectral Plausibility Rating: Likelihood that a haunting could be true within world rules.

RWF.description: Reliability Weighting Factor: Rates the credibility of sources contributing to the region's story.

DET.description: Dread Exposure Threshold: Time a character can remain in the area before psychological effects.

HVF.description: Historical Veracity Factor: Measure of how closely the region's portrayal aligns with documented history.

LSG.description: Liminal Stress Gradient: Sharpness of transition between different states or biomes.

SHCI.description: Spectral-Historical Coherence Index: Measures the consistency between spectral activity and historical events.

preconditions.description: List of invariant IDs that must be satisfied before this region can be activated or accessed.
